name: Juejin Article Optimizer
description: Optimize technical articles for the Juejin community: improve rankings, readability, and developer engagement.

workflowSteps.name: Article Ingestion
workflowSteps.input: Draft markdown or existing Juejin URL

workflowSteps.name: Gap Analysis
workflowSteps.output: Prioritized improvement list with score-impact estimates

workflowSteps.name: Title Optimization
workflowSteps.output: 3 optimized title variants with CTR scores

workflowSteps.name: Content Optimization
workflowSteps.input: Original article + gap analysis + chosen title
workflowSteps.output: Optimized article with enriched code blocks and visual markers

workflowSteps.name: Publishing Strategy
workflowSteps.output: Best publish time, cross-promotion copy, engagement plan

steps: Paste your article draft and say: 帮我优化这篇文章
Review the diagnostic score and pick your favorite title from 3 variants
Receive the fully optimized article with SEO tags and publishing strategy in ~30 seconds
firstSuccessPath.cli: bash scripts/optimizer.sh --title "Go并发编程入门" --task diagnose

scripts.usage: bash scripts/optimizer.sh --title "Go并发编程入门" --task diagnose
scripts.full: bash scripts/optimizer.sh --title "Go并发编程入门" --task full --tags "后端,Go语言"
